title: kotschya carsonii subsp. reflexa
intro: Kotschya carsonii subsp. reflexa, also known as the African Kotschya, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever, due to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as hypertension, diabetes, and gastrointestinal disorders, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Kotschya carsonii subsp. reflexa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
